caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a room filled with apparel and memorabilia. His shirt features the white text "YOU NEVER START AT WORK". He is positioned in front of a wall adorned with framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and green pants. To the right, clothing racks filled with colorful garments are visible. On-screen logos appear in the corners of the frame, including one that reads "ROLLY POLLY 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expressions and head orientation as he talks. The background elements, including the mannequin and the wall of photos, remain static throughout the clip.
